message:
fix: add doctor subsystem test coverage and fix 3 bugs (bd-0jkc)

Fix CheckRepoFingerprint [:8] slice panic on short IDs via truncateID helper.
Fix CheckMetadataVersionTracking index panic on single-part versions.
Fix CheckIDFormat dead branch where both paths returned identical output.

Add ~40 new test cases across 7 files covering: version tracking,
integrity checks, hook version comparison, server helpers, gitignore
redirect handling, child-parent dependency validation, and git conflicts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
